channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Apple’s emotional lamp and the future of robots
item.description: Pixar Animation Studios has an unusual logo. The basic logo is the word “Pixar.” But sometimes, an animated lamp named Luxo Jr. hops into the frame and jumps on the letter “i.” The lap exudes personality and represents Pixar’s ability to turn any object into a compelling character.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Apple has been charged with abuse of power by this German watchdog. Here’s why
item.description: The German antitrust authority has charged Apple with abusing its market power through its app tracking tool and giving itself preferential treatment in a move that could result in daily fines for the iPhone maker if it fails to change its business practices.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: AI-powered fitness revolutionizing workouts with adaptive equipment
item.description: “I’m a tech nerd really at heart, and it’s cool to be on that cutting edge,” said Trevor Gere, co-owner of The Smart Fit Method in Northwest Suburban Kildeer.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Barnes, NewsNation

item.title: Scout Motors' effort to directly sell its electric SUVs where they'll make them stalls
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — Legislation to let Volkswagen-backed Scout Motors sell its electric SUVs directly to people in South Carolina, where the vehicles will be built, has stalled after fierce opposition from traditional automobile dealers.
item.dc:creator: JEFFREY COLLINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Instagram’s AI bots are often sexually suggestive—and sometimes underage
item.description: When Meta launched its “AI Studio” feature for over two billion Instagram users in July 2024, the company promised a tool that would give anyone the ability to create their own AI characters “to make you laugh, generate memes, give travel advice, and so much more.
item.dc:creator: Jocelyn Mintz, Fast Company

item.title: SAP: Latest news and insights
item.description: SAP is an enterprise software vendor based in Walldorf, Germany. Its cloud and on-premises enterprise resource planning (ERP) software, including S/4HANA, helps organizations manage their business operations and customer relations.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: State says $400 million armored EV contract on hold
item.description: The State Department is placing a $400 million contract to build armored electric vehicles (EVs) on hold, a spokesperson told The Hill on Thursday. Tech billionaire Elon Musk’s Tesla appears to have been a likely recipient of the contract, which originated from the Biden administration.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Musk says he'll withdraw $97.4 billion bid for OpenAI if ChatGPT maker remains nonprofit
item.description: Elon Musk says he will abandon his $97.4 billion offer to buy the nonprofit behind OpenAI if the ChatGPT maker drops its plan to convert into a for-profit company. “If OpenAI, Inc.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: What is SASE? How the cloud marries networking and security
item.description: Secure Access Service Edge (SASE) is a network architecture that combines software-defined wide area networking (SD-WAN) and security functionality into a unified cloud service that promises simplified WAN deployments, improved efficiency and security, and application-specific bandwidth policies.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: IP Fabric expands network visibility, automation with platform update
item.description: As modern networking deployments across the cloud and edge become increasingly complex, it can be a non-trivial exercise for teams to get proper visibility.
item.dc:creator: Network World
